home.title: Welcome
home.bio:
I like building software — especially products that power real-world transportation.

I'm the founder of GoodJourney.io, where my team and I are building the next generation of tools for ground transportation — helping fleets manage bookings, dispatch, drivers, and global supplier networks on one unified platform.

Now we're bringing AI into the platform to automate the mundane tasks — things like booking workflows, dispatch decisions, and operational alerts — so operators can focus on delivering great service.

At heart, I'm a product builder, obsessed with turning complex systems into software that feels simple and reliable.

When I'm not building, you'll probably find me practicing golf… or enjoying my favorite cookie — dark chocolate quinoa sea salt. Absolutely Fing delicious.

This blog is my personal journal—a space for thoughts, learnings, and notes as I explore and document new ideas.
